summary.en: This is a review, or perhaps more of a practical, first impression, nontechnical summary using the Fujinon 18–135mm f/3.5–5.6 R LM OIS lens on holiday. Reviews and further reading are listed at the end.
summary.no: This is a review, or perhaps more of a practical, first impression, nontechnical summary using the Fujinon 18–135mm f/3.5–5.6 R LM OIS lens on holiday. Reviews and further reading are listed at the end.
